desc.text: The jungle didn't reclaim the world by chance. The temple runs on a growth pattern — an algorithm that never lies. Start from zero, let it grow, and keep track of what came before. The next step is always built from the last two. Enter the sequence in time to unlock the element of wood.
You stand before the flame. It is not your enemy. It is not your servant. Fire answers only to discipline. Learn its laws - or be consumed by your own ignorance,
Steel remembers every mistake. The universe's mechanisms answer only to rhythm and order. It does not reward errors. Observe the sequence. Repeat it to unlock the element of metal.

The sacred pipes of the Water Chamber lie broken and tangled. Only when the flow runs pure and unbroken from source to vessel will the ancient symbol reveal itself. Rotate the pipe segments. Restore the flow. Let the water find its way. The temple rewards those who move with purpose.
Restore the balance. Have you gathered the right elements? Place theme where they belong, wrong element? The gate stays sealed and balance is off.
